title: Cooldown
lore: Inspired by opening a window after cooking — Kayan East kept the shuffle slow, like air finally finding the east-facing room.
artistPersona: Nu-disco, house, and garage producer — every drop is 'a cultural moment,' and the compass only points east.
albumConcept: Garage subs and deep-house corridors — Kayan East takes the College Dropout warmth underground, bass pointing east.
